allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5678/healthz" -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "n8n CORRIENDO - status:" $r.StatusCode } catch { Write-Host "n8n NO está corriendo:" $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows" -Headers @{"accept"="application/json"} -ErrorAction Stop; $r.data | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "ID:$\($_.id\) | $\($_.name\) | activo:$\($_.active\)" })
Bash(sqlite3 __TRACKED_VAR__/.n8n/database.sqlite 'SELECT id, name, active FROM workflow_entity ORDER BY id;')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['public_url']\) for t in d.get\('tunnels',[]\)]")
